# Rynix Studio

> Real-time creative visual effects editor with 18+ rendering modes

## Overview
Browser-based creative tool for ASCII art, dot effects, shader rendering, glyph processing, and video effects. All processing runs client-side.

## Docs
- [README](./README.md): Setup, scripts, environment variables
- [ARCHITECTURE](./ARCHITECTURE.md): System design, render pipeline, state management
- [Context](./Context.md): AI-friendly project summary

## Routes
- / : Landing page
- /edit : Main editor
- /privacy : Privacy policy
- /pricing : Pricing page
- /product : Product overview

## Key Features
- 18 rendering modes (ASCII, dots, tonekit, blur, glyph, scanline, crystal-edge, etc.)
- Webcam, video, and image input
- 20+ export formats
- Physics-based particle systems
- Real-time shader effects
- Deterministic frame recording for export
